citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: ... Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries, or signpost you to a person or service to help you further
Please contact privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk with your enquiries.
Provide a landlord reference within 5 working days when you email us at accommodation@napier.ac.uk
ENSA Advice ... Please contact ENSA Advice on 0131 229 8791 to arrange an appointment or email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk
We operate a waiting list for University accommodation after our guarantee date in August. ... please contact us at accommodation@napier.ac.uk or phone 0131 455 3713
Provide access to other support services within the University

findings.text: The University provides a dedicated accommodation support service reachable via privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk.
The service can provide a landlord reference within 5 working days upon email request to accommodation@napier.ac.uk.
ENSA Advice offers free, confidential welfare and education advice including accommodation help, tenant rights, and dispute resolution.
A waiting list for University accommodation exists after the August guarantee date; contact accommodation@napier.ac.uk or 0131 455 3713.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Accommodation Support Contacts

### Source: NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025)

**Key Contacts Identified:**

1. **Private Accommodation Support Service**
   - Email: privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk
   - Services: advice, flat viewings, dedicated staff, signposting, internet/phone access, landlord references

2. **General Accommodation Enquiries**
   - Email: accommodation@napier.ac.uk
   - Phone: 0131 455 3713
   - Services: waiting list for university accommodation, landlord references (5 working days)

3. **ENSA Advice (Students' Association)**
   - Email: ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk
   - Phone: 0131 229 8791
   - Services: accommodation advice, lease review, tenant rights, dispute help

**External Resources Referenced:**
   - scotland.shelter.org.uk
   - citizensadvice.org.uk

**Note:** No specific records of Anfal's contacts with these services are present in this source. Further search of internal case notes or emails is required.
proposed_artifacts.title: Accommodation Support Contacts Evidence Map

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search internal case notes, email logs, and support system records for any contacts by or about 'Anfal' with the accommodation support service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk), general accommodation (accommodation@napier.ac.uk), or ENSA Advice (ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk). Look for emails, phone logs, or case notes referencing accommodation issues, arrears, or support requests. Report any findings with dates, summaries, and source references.
proposed_tasks.title: Search internal records for Anfal's accommodation support contacts

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025) for accommodation support contacts. Identified three key contact points: Private Accommodation Support Service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk), General Accommodation (accommodation@napier.ac.uk, 0131 455 3713), and ENSA Advice (ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk, 0131 229 8791). Services include advice, flat viewings, landlord references, and dispute help. No records of Anfal's specific contacts found in this source. Proposed follow-up task to search internal case notes and emails.

uncertainties.text: No records of Anfal's actual contacts with the identified support services are present in this source.
